items.title: EU AI Act — sample milestone timeline

events.title: Regulation published in Official Journal (sample)
events.summary_for_review: Sample timeline event aligned with the manual law record sample date for Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 publication. Verify exact publication details and citations on EUR-Lex before any client use.
events.legal_safe_note: Sample milestone for data-model testing. Not verified on source in this repository. Phased obligations apply over multiple dates; do not treat as complete legal timeline.

events.title: General application start (sample — phased obligations apply)
events.summary_for_review: Sample date reflecting commonly cited general application timing in public summaries. Many obligations phase in at different dates; confirm all deadlines on official sources.
events.legal_safe_note: Illustrative sample only. Official EUR-Lex and Commission implementation materials control. Human legal review required.

events.title: Commission AI Office implementation communications (ongoing)
